notes: Use py -3.13 -m pytest for verification on this host.
The checked evidence contract includes selected_sources.json to align with Task 7 runtime documentation.
Warnings observed in targeted regression are shapefile field-name truncation warnings from pyogrio/geopandas test fixtures.
Google/OpenBuildingMap/Google Open Buildings Vector/local Microsoft remain manual-preload supplements and are not automatic fallback sources.
raw.geonames.poi is documented as an alias of raw.gns.poi.
